caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" and "MAN" printed on it, a black baseball cap with an emblem, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain and a watch on his left wrist. In front of him is a professional microphone. Behind him is a white wall with stars and the words "HUSTLE" repeated, and a screen displaying "BOSS TALK 101". A red and white logo on the bottom corners reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man raises both hands to his head, adjusting his headphones. His expression remains focused as he shifts his hands slightly and adjusts his posture, moving from a position where his hands are near his temples to a position where they are firmly pressing the headphones against his ears.
